title: Bitcoin Net Worth
description: This dashboard tracks Bitcoin-denominated net worth across assets and liabilities with snapshot history, charting, and optional local encryption for live data

title: Bitcoin Quantum Exposure
description: This dashboard tracks exposed Bitcoin supply, pubkeys, and UTXOs by script type and spend activity, with historical views and top exposure filters

title: DCA Cost Basis
description: This dashboard tracks Bitcoin weighted-average DCA cost basis across daily, weekly, and monthly cadences and compares it to spot price

title: BIP-110 Signaling
description: This dashboard focuses on miner signaling across each 2,016-block period for BIP-110, with SegWit signaling periods included for historical comparison

title: Node Count
description: This dashboard tracks Bitcoin node count over time and the software versions nodes are running

title: Bitcoin Dominance
description: This dashboard shows Bitcoin's share of market cap relative to the top cryptocurrencies
